name: Birdsong
description: Melodic bird calls with natural musicality

prompts.SessionStart: bright piccolo whistle ascending with clear high bird-call melody, piccolo flute tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: piccolo whistle descending with smooth high bird-call decay, piccolo flute tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single bright piccolo whistle note with satisfying bird-like ring, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct piccolo chirp with crisp high bird tick, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short piccolo trill confirming with bright bird-call ping, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two piccolo whistle tones with questioning rising bird-call interval, piccolo flute, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady piccolo whistle with clear rhythmic bird-call pattern, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: piccolo whistle splitting into two diverging bird-call voices, piccolo sound, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear piccolo whistle ping returning with distinct bird-call ring, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic piccolo whistle burst with rapid bird-call trill, piccolo tone, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
